metadata.title: Acme Health capstone - SOC 2 control selection

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, implements, operates, and maintains environmental protections and data recovery mechanisms, including versioning to recover from unintended overwrites or deletions.

groups.title: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

controls.title: Logical access security - data at rest protection

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect information assets, including encryption of data at rest under keys the entity controls.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data and resources based on roles and least privilege, restricting access to only what each principal requires.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries, including network segmentation isolating workloads from public networks.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized channels and protects it during transmission, including enforcing encryption in transit (TLS).
